decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a powerful control tool, with a range of spells and creatures that provide versatility and flexibility in different matchups. The inclusion of Bring to Light allows for searching for answers when needed, while Leyline Binding and Vanishing Verse provide removal options. The deck also includes powerful threats such as Niv-Mizzet, Supreme and Omnath, Locus of Creation, backed up by a solid manabase and various support cards like Lightning Helix and Supreme Verdict to control the game and outvalue opponents.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and powerful creatures like Sentinel of the Nameless City and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress while also maintaining a strong board presence with creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mutavault. With a focus on resource denial and versatile removal options like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay, the deck seeks to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a longer game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure on the opponent through aggressive creatures and disruption effects. By utilizing mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic, the deck aims to ramp into powerful threats such as Archon of Emeria and Skyclave Apparition. Cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Enduring Innocence help to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining pressure and tempo. The inclusion of Collected Company provides additional creature advantage and synergy. Overall, the deck is designed to overwhelm opponents with efficient creatures and disruptive elements.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cheap and efficient spells and creatures to apply early pressure and maintain tempo throughout the game. The deck aims to quickly deal damage to the opponent while controlling the board with burn spells and versatile creatures. By combining card draw and aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, alongside removal spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage, the deck looks to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through a mix of direct damage and creature combat.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on maintaining control of the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. The inclusion of Yorion as a companion allows for additional value by blinking permanents for extra card advantage. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with various disruptive spells and ultimately grind out a win through card advantage and efficient removal. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of cards that provide card draw, ramp, and additional disruption to help stay ahead in the game.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on putting pressure on the opponent early in the game by playing efficient creatures like Archon of Emeria and Skyclave Apparition. The deck also utilizes mana dorks like Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves to ramp into powerful spells like Collected Company and Elspeth, Storm Slayer. Thalia, Guardian of Thraben disrupts the opponent's plays while Ouroboroid and The Wandering Emperor provide resilience and card advantage. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, allowing the deck to maintain a fast and aggressive pace throughout the game.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear, Soul-Scar Mage, and Cori-Steel Cutter, backed up by burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to control the board and deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes card draw and selection spells like Sleight of Hand and Consider to find key cards and maintain card advantage. The mana base is optimized with a mix of lands like Riverglide Pathway, Shivan Reef, and Riverpyre Verge to ensure smooth gameplay and consistent access to both red and blue mana sources.

The deck focuses on using control elements such as counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to outvalue the opponent. By utilizing cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Dovin's Veto, the goal is to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of cards like Ultima and Memory Deluge allows for strong late-game plays and card advantage. The companion Yorion, Sky Nomad provides additional value by flickering permanents for extra value. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through attrition and card advantage.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on casting cheap spells to pump up creatures and deal direct damage to the opponent. The key strategy revolves around using prowess triggers from spells like Flow State, Stormchaser's Talent, and Sleight of Hand to boost the power of creatures like Emberheart Challenger, Soul-Scar Mage, and Monastery Swiftspear. Reckless Rage and Burst Lightning provide removal and direct damage spells to control the board and finish off opponents. The mana base is optimized for consistent access to red and blue mana sources to cast spells efficiently.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Greasefang Parhelion combo to generate value and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards that provide ramp and protection, as well as removal and disruption to control the game. The Monument to Endurance and Fleeting Spirit can help to generate tokens and maintain board presence, while Thoughtseize and Fatal Push provide disruption and removal options. Overall, the goal is to set up the combo and protect it while applying pressure to the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between Greasefang, Okiba Boss, Monument to Endurance, and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. The strategy involves controlling the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize while setting up the combo pieces. Bleachbone Verge and Brightclimb Pathway help fix mana, while Guardian of New Benalia provides additional support. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence and powerful abilities.

This deck focuses on using disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's field while deploying powerful creatures like Sentinel of the Nameless City and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to pressure the opponent. The mana base is designed to support a variety of powerful spells and ensure consistent casting of high-impact cards. Additionally, cards like Witherbloom Charm and Maelstrom Pulse provide additional removal options, while creatures like Keen-Eyed Curator and Tinybones, the Pickpocket offer card advantage and incremental value. This deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent through a combination of disruption and efficient threats.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive spells and creatures in order to quickly deal damage and win the game. By utilizing cards like Cori-Steel Cutter, Soul-Scar Mage, and Monastery Swiftspear, along with instant spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck also includes card draw and tutoring effects to maintain a consistent flow of threats and answers, while leveraging the power of the UR color combination for versatile and explosive plays.

This deck focuses on building up a strong board presence by quickly ramping up mana with cards like Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves, then using that mana to play powerful green creatures like Cavalier of Thorns and Old-Growth Troll. Kiora, Behemoth Beckoner helps accelerate the game plan by untapping lands and drawing cards. Nykthos, Shrine to Nyx and Storm the Festival provide additional mana and card advantage. The deck's goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful green creatures and generate massive amounts of mana to cast them.

The key concept of this deck is to assemble a strong board presence using creatures like Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Guardian of New Benalia, supported by Monument to Endurance and Parhelion II. The deck also includes a control element with cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Sheltered by Ghosts to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Bleachbone Verge and Brightclimb Pathway provide mana fixing, while Erode and Fleeting Spirit offer additional utility. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its combo potential and strong synergy between its cards.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Skyclave Apparition, supported by mana acceleration from Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Archon of Emeria and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben, while also providing resilient threats with Ouroboroid and Aven Interrupter. The inclusion of Collected Company allows for explosive turns, while cards like Elspeth, Storm Slayer and Surrak, Elusive Hunter provide additional ways to close out the game swiftly.
